quantum_prep.title: Stockpile Create Teleporters quantum chain inputs — Redstone Pearls, Quantum Fluid (Chorus + Water), Quantum Casing

ch17_checklist.title: Complete the Ch17 readiness check — Celestial Netherite full set, Eiswein batch, ISS archmage loadout, Elytra

subtitle.text: Ch17 is the quantum mechanism, the teleporter finale, and the endgame sequence. Come prepared for all three.

description: CH.16 · READY FOR CH17
▸ Ch17 (Lords of All) is the final chapter.
It completes the Create Teleporters quantum_mechanism chain,
the ISS archmage build, the nuclear endgame sequence,
and the Genie final wishes system.
Ch17 assumes Ch16 is complete.
Complete Ch16 first. Then come.
◈ CREATE TELEPORTERS PREP
└ 5-step quantum chain: Redstone Pearl → Quantum Fluid →
Quantum Casing → Advanced Component → Quantum Mechanism
└ The quantum_mechanism triggers the Phase 17 Mastery Age
(History Stages final age transition — everything unlocks)
└ Prep: stockpile Redstone Pearls + Chorus + Water for fluid
Quantum Casing requires advanced Create components
└ The full 5-step chain is in Ch17 (ch17_r_quantum series)
Start sourcing materials now
◈ CH17 READINESS CHECKLIST
└ ✦ Celestial Netherite armor: fully enchanted (Protection IV+ minimum)
└ ✦ Celestial Netherite sword: Sharpness VI if Ancient Tomes obtained
└ ✦ Eiswein batch: 8 bottles (full-heal emergency supply)
└ ✦ ISS Eldritch loadout: Ring of Mana + focus + spell book
└ ✦ Elytra: equipped + spare in Ender Chest
└ ✦ Tipped Arrows: 64+ (Lingering Potion from Dragon Breath)
└ ✦ Baby Trigon: alive and fed
└ ✦ Shulker Boxes: 27 minimum, organized by category
└ ✦ Create SU network: running passively for teleporter fuel
◈ MASTERY AGE AWARENESS
└ The quantum_mechanism crafting triggers Phase 17 Mastery Age
└ This is the History Stages final age — all remaining content unlocks
└ New JEI recipes appear after the transition
└ The nuclear endgame (Cannon Nukes, Create Nuclear Shell) also
unlocks fully in Ch17 — have your Steel Reactor running
before triggering the age
▸ The Long Road Home ended here.
You came home from the End.
You built the kingdom.
You forged the armor.
You brewed the wine.
You built the music hall.
You have the ship in the harbor.
The road runs to the sea.
The sky is yours.
Ch17 is what you do with all of that.
▶ Stockpile quantum chain inputs for Ch17 [check]
▶ Complete the Ch17 readiness checklist [check]
◇ Ch17 tab: Lords of All.
The tab unlocks via the ch16_gate dependency chain.',
Everything from Ch01-16 has been preparation.
Ch17 is the culmination.
Enter it with everything you have built.
It was designed for exactly this.
